info.name: Campaign Draft, Publish & Save APIs
info.description: APIs for creating drafts, publishing campaigns, and saving/bookmarking campaigns

item.name: Brand Campaign Management

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Summer Collection Launch Campaign",
  "description": "We are launching our new sustainable summer collection and we're looking for passionate creators to showcase our products. The campaign focuses on authenticity, style, and a love for our planet.",
  "status": "draft",
  "budget": 5000,
  "currency": "NGN",
  "budgetRange": {
    "min": 200,
    "max": 500,
    "currency": "NGN"
  },
  "platform": ["instagram", "tiktok"],
  "mainGoal": "brand_awareness",
  "goals": ["brand_awareness", "engagement"],
  "serviceType": "influencer_service",
  "compensationType": "paid",
  "deliverables": ["feed_post", "story"],
  "campaignDuration": "3 weeks",
  "postVisibilityDuration": "30 days on page",
  "requirements": {
    "followerRange": {
      "range": "micro",
      "min": 1000,
      "max": 10000
    },
    "followers": {
      "min": 1000
    },
    "location": ["United States"],
    "niche": ["fashion_beauty"],
    "gender": ["female", "all"]
  },
  "tags": ["sustainable", "fashion", "summer"],
  "isUrgent": false,
  "isPublic": true,
  "maxApplicants": 50,
  "dueDate": "2026-01-31T23:59:59.000Z",
  "applicationDeadline": "2024-12-31T23:59:59.000Z"
}

request.description: Create a new campaign as a draft. Status defaults to 'draft' if not provided. dueDate is optional for drafts.

response.name: Create Campaign (Draft)

request.description: Create a minimal draft campaign with only name and description. Other fields can be added later via update.

query.description: Filter by status: draft, open, accepting_bids, in_progress, completed, cancelled

request.description: Get all campaigns for the authenticated brand. Can filter by status. Returns drafts and published campaigns.

request.description: Update a campaign. Can update any field. Use this to add missing fields to drafts before publishing.

request.description: Publish a draft campaign. Changes status from 'draft' to 'open'. Validates all required fields are present. Returns error if campaign is missing required fields or if dueDate is not in the future.

response.name: Publish Campaign

request.description: Delete a campaign permanently. Can delete drafts or published campaigns. Removes campaign from all saved lists.

item.description: APIs for brands to manage their campaigns (create, update, publish, delete)

item.name: Campaign Save/Bookmark (Creators)

request.description: Save/bookmark a campaign for later. Only works for published, public campaigns (not drafts). Prevents duplicate saves.
Remove a campaign from saved list. Returns error if campaign is not saved.
Get all saved/bookmarked campaigns for the authenticated user. Only returns published, public campaigns. Excludes drafts.

item.description: APIs for creators (or any user) to save/bookmark campaigns and view saved campaigns

item.name: Public Campaign APIs

query.description: Filter by status. Default shows open/accepting_bids campaigns.

request.description: Get all public campaigns (for creators to browse). Excludes drafts. Can filter by status, platform, serviceType, niche, etc.
Get campaign details by ID. Public endpoint - no auth required.

item.description: Public APIs for browsing campaigns (no authentication required)

variable.description: JWT token from login. Get from POST /api/auth/login
Campaign ID - automatically set after creating a campaign
